diagrams.title: BMW Color Coding Chart
diagrams.description: Four-color segregation system for biomedical waste management
elements: Yellow - Infectious waste (human anatomical, soiled, linen, microbiology)
Red - Plastic waste (gloves, tubes, catheters, syringes)
White - Sharps (needles, broken glass, metallic implants)
Blue - Glassware (vials, ampoules, metallic implants non-sharp)
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for proper waste segregation at healthcare facilities

diagrams.title: BMW Management Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process from waste generation to final disposal
elements: Generation → Segregation → Collection → Storage → Transportation → Treatment → Disposal → Documentation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding complete waste management lifecycle in healthcare settings

diagrams.title: Treatment Methods by Waste Type
diagrams.description: Mapping waste categories to appropriate treatment technologies
diagrams.purpose: Selecting correct treatment method for each waste category

visuals.title: Biomedical Waste Management Rules 2016
visuals.description: Visual diagram for biomedical waste management rules 2016
